nasb.text: On the outer side, as one went up to the gateway toward the north, were two tables; and on the other side of the porch of the gate were two tables.

esv.text: And off to the side, on the outside as one goes up to the entrance of the north gate, were two tables; and off to the other side of the vestibule of the gate were two tables.

cnv.text: 在北門入口的臺階那裡，朝向外面的一邊有兩張桌子，朝向門廊的另一邊也有兩張桌子。

ccb.text: 内院北门的两边各有两张桌子，
